task_name: Define Mock Builder Adapter Endpoint Boundary
goal: Define the mock-backed Builder Adapter endpoint boundary before any live Builder endpoint is introduced.
claims: BP-010 defines a mock-backed endpoint boundary without adding a runtime endpoint.
The boundary specifies request shape, response shape, blocked behavior, and fixture-based verification.
The boundary explicitly keeps live Builder, network calls, deploy, merge, AICOS write, and Maya write out of scope.
assumptions: A document-only endpoint boundary is the correct next step before implementation.
Existing mock CLI fixtures are the evidence basis for endpoint behavior.
No package, tool, example, or runtime edit is required.
dod: The document defines endpoint purpose, route shape, request envelope, response envelope, blocking rules, fixture mapping, and non-goals.
The document explicitly forbids live Builder calls and network behavior in the mock endpoint phase.
stop_conditions: Live Builder endpoint or network call becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-009 proved approved human-review can proceed in the mock adapter while decision_ready remains false; BP-010 should define endpoint shape before live Builder integration.
